title: MineRooms
description: This mod will allow you to discover the backrooms directly in Minecraft either by creating them yourself or by using the map found in the in the description.
body:
# **features :**
**This mod will allow you to discover the backrooms directly in Minecraft either by creating them yourself or by using the map found in the in the description.**


- block, stairs, wall, glass pane and slab of wall/floor/roof level 0
- block, stairs, wall, glass pane and slab of wall/floor/roof level 1
- light of backrooms
- block, stairs, wall, glass pane and slab of poolroom wall
- block, stairs, wall, glass pane and slab of dark poolroom wall
- beautiful electrical outlet
- a killer block
- the entity of the level 0
- an ambiance sound for level 0
- the smiler
- a flashlight (requires dynamic light)
- More Comming Soon !
  # **Modpack MineRooms**
[MineRooms modpack ](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minerooms-modpack)
  # **Map MineRooms**
**the map requires the latest version of the modpack**
comming soon
